meta.title: How To Actually Make Money with Whop Clipping - It's Simple
meta.description:
In this video I show you how you can make money by clipping on Whop.
AI Clipping Tool 👉 https://www.opus.pro/?via=whop

In this video I walk you through how to use AI to start  with Whop clipping. I will show you how to find the best whop campaigns and I will show you how you can use a tool called Opus Clip to make clips for your whop videos.

👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/


This video is based on my personal experiences with Whop Clipping. Results are not guaranteed. I've stated what worked for me and what I did to start this business. This requires hard work and a lot of time.
